mapper.select: select extrc_mfcmm_id , mfcmm_extrc_id , expert_id , lsn_result_cd , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_extrc_mfcmm where extrc_mfcmm_id = #{extrcMfcmmId}

/** UsptExtrcMfcmmDao.selectList */ select a.odr_no , a.evl_cmit_id , c.expert_id , c.expert_nm , c.gender_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('GENDER', c.gender_cd) as gender_nm , c.native , c.enc_brthdy , c.enc_mbtlnum , c.enc_email , c.wrc_nm , c.dept_nm , c.ofcps_nm , c.dty_nm , c.wrc_adres , c.wrc_adres_detail , c.wrc_adres_zip , c.wrc_telno , c.last_univ_nm , c.univ_dept_nm , c.act_realm_cd , c.attachment_group_id , c.expert_reqst_process_sttus_cd from uspt_evl_mfcmm_extrc a /*평가위원추출조건*/ left outer join uspt_extrc_mfcmm b /*추출위원*/ on a.mfcmm_extrc_id = b.mfcmm_extrc_id inner join uspt_expert c /*전문가*/ on b.expert_id = c.expert_id where 1 = 1 and a.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId} and a.odr_no = #{odrNo}
